::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \newcounter{SavedSecNumDepth}
    \setcounter{SavedSecNumDepth}{\value{secnumdepth}}
    \setcounter{secnumdepth}{0}

    \pagestyle{plain} 
    \setcounter{page}{1}
    \begin{center}
        {\Large Math {{< var course.number >}}: {{< var course.name >}}}
    \end{center}

    \section*{Course Basics}

    \newcommand{\instructorname}{%
        {{< var instructor.name >}}%
    }
    \newcommand{\instructoremail}{%
        {{< var instructor.email >}}%
    }
    \newcommand{\instructoroffice}{%
        {{< var instructor.office >}}%
    }
    \newcommand{\classtime}{%
        {{< var logistics.class-time >}}%
    }    
    \newcommand{\classlocation}{%
        {{< var logistics.class-location >}}%
    }    
    \newcommand{\dropinlocation}{%
        {{< var logistics.dropin-location >}}%
    }    

    \begin{tabular}{
    >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.9in}
    >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{1.9in}
    >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{1.5in}
    >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{1.5in}
    }
    \toprule
    \cellcolor{lightgray}\textbf{Instructor} &
    \instructorname &
    \cellcolor{lightgray}\textbf{Class Time} &
    \href{https://www.carleton.edu/registrar/calendars/daily-class-timetable/}{\classtime} \\
    \midrule
    \cellcolor{lightgray}\textbf{Email} &
    \href{mailto:\instructoremail }{\texttt{\instructoremail}} &
    \cellcolor{lightgray}\textbf{Class Location} &
    \classlocation \\
    \midrule
    \cellcolor{lightgray}\textbf{Office} &
    \textcolor{black}{\instructoroffice} &
    \cellcolor{lightgray}\textbf{Drop-In Location} &
    \textcolor{black}{\dropinlocation} \\
    \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}    
```
:::
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

## Course Basics

+ **Instructor Office:** {{< var instructor.office >}}
+ **Class Location:** {{< var logistics.class-location >}}
+ **Class Time:** [{{< var logistics.class-time >}}](https://www.carleton.edu/registrar/calendars/daily-class-timetable/)
+ **Drop-In Location:** {{< var logistics.dropin-location >}}
+ **Drop-In Time:** {{< var logistics.dropin-time >}}
:::
